import pickle


def serialize_events(events):
    results = []
    for event in events:
        data = pickle.dumps(event)
        results.append(data)
    return results


def save_records(records):
    blobs = []
    for record in records:
        blob = pickle.dumps({"id": record["id"], "value": record["value"]})
        blobs.append(blob)
    return blobs


def cache_items(items):
    cached = []
    for item in items:
        cached.append(pickle.dumps(item))
    return cached
